request.title: Procurement Request
request.newSubtitle: HO and BMGMC Admin/Transport open their own requests. BMGMC Technical Affairs opens requests for other BMGMC departments and stations.
request.newSubtitleModern: Modern request form — region and date are filled automatically. Set subject, priority, and attach documents.

chain.title: Approval Chain
chain.emptyDocuments: Attach files — they will appear here

request.subject: Subject
request.submitHint: After creation the request appears in the registry with the selected priority color
request.noAccess: You do not have permission to create procurement requests
request.subject: Subject
request.bilingualHint: Fill in the subject in both English and Russian.
request.bilingualRequired: Please fill in both Subject (English) and Subject (Russian).

phaseStepper.upcomingLocked: This stage opens after previous steps are completed

request.expressRequestSummary: Request created and waiting for the next process stage.
request.approvalYourTurnBanner: Your turn — review the request and decide

processDocs.empty: No files uploaded or generated yet

request.registrationDoneHint: Request has been assigned an official ATG-REQ number after full approval and is routed to Marketing.
request.registrationPendingHint: After all approvers sign off, the system assigns an official ATG-REQ number (e.g. ATG-REQ-2026-0001), then forwards to Marketing.
request.marketingRfqRegistrationDoneHint: RFQ registered at marketing step 3 (e.g. ATG-CP-MT-LO-26-001). The RFQ document has been generated.
request.marketingRfqRegistrationPendingHint: The ATG-CP registration number is assigned when the marketing engineer registers and generates the RFQ at workflow step 3.
request.marketingPlanRegistrationDoneHint: Procurement plan registered at marketing step 6 (e.g. ATG-SBP-2026-001, ATG-LPS-2026-001).
request.marketingPlanRegistrationPendingHint: ATG-SBP / ATG-LPS / ATG-SPS / ATG-QRS / ATG-DPS / ATG-TS numbers are assigned at step 6 when the procurement method is selected.
request.topologyHint: End-to-end routing topology — from initiation through Marketing to Contracts. Top managers can monitor where each request stands in real time.
request.forwardContractsHint: Marketing has reviewed the request. Forward to the Contracts & Procurement Department for the next stage.
request.step6Hint: Upload TA / MR / SR and assign approvers (Initiator, TAS Manager, BMGMC Top Manager)
request.rejectTasHint: Stop processing this request. A reason is required.
request.tasRejectedBanner: This request was rejected by the Technical Affairs engineer and will not proceed.
request.atMarketingHint: Request transferred to Tashkent HO Marketing and Tender Management Department. A task has been created for the department.
request.acceptMarketingHint: Confirm that HO Marketing department has received the request and started work.
request.assignSpecialistHint: Assign a marketing or tender specialist from HO-MKT, Marketing Section, or Tender Section.
request.assignSpecialistHintMkt: Select an engineer from the Marketing Section (HO-MKT-MKT). After assignment, the specialist must accept the request.
request.noMarketingWorkers: No marketing specialists available — contact IT
request.selectSpecialistRequired: Select a specialist from the list
request.waitingSpecialistAccept: Specialist assigned — waiting for them to accept the request.
request.acceptMarketingHintEngineer: Confirm that you accept this request and are ready to proceed to step 2.

step3.loadError: Failed to load RFQ step data
step3.step4Hint: Assign registration number, set commercial proposal deadline, generate RFQ from template, then IT and Tenderweek channels open automatically.
step3.rfqDocumentRequired: Register and generate the RFQ document (set deadline first)
step3.channelsReady: All channels closed — mark step complete (Выполнено).
step3.atgCloseHint: IT completes the Help Desk ticket to close this channel.
step3.tenderEngineerHint: Publish RFQ on tenderweek.com, then click Completed.
step3.readOnly: RFQ actions are available to the assigned marketing engineer.

step4Proposals.proposalsHint: Marketing engineer adds companies with technical document and price. TAS responsible approves or rejects each proposal.

step5Approved.approvedHint: Companies approved by the initiator. Review and complete the step to continue.

step6Plan.loadError: Failed to load procurement plan data
step6Plan.title: Procurement plan preparation
step6Plan.hint: Select a procurement method, register the number, and download the template. Edit the document and upload the completed file.
step6Plan.methodChangedHint: Procurement method changed — click Register again for a new number and template.
step6Plan.templateMissingHint: Template not found — click Register again.
step6Plan.editAndUploadHint: Edit the template in Word and upload the completed document below.
step6Plan.tenderNoTemplateHint: Tender has no template — only the ATG-TS registration number is required.
step6Plan.uploadRequired: Upload the edited procurement plan before completing this step.
step6Plan.readOnly: Actions are available to the assigned marketing engineer.

step4.loadError: Failed to load RFQ step data
step4.step4Hint: Upload the RFQ document, then open requests on the ATG website (Help Desk IT) and/or Tenderweek (Inna Kogay / Svetlana Kim). Both channels can run in parallel. Complete step 4 after all opened requests are closed.
step4.rfqDocumentRequired: Upload the RFQ file before opening channel requests
step4.channelsReady: All channel requests are closed — you can complete step 4.
step4.atgCloseHint: IT completes the ticket → you close it in Help Desk to finish this channel.
step4.tenderCloseHint: Tender officer marks the task Done in Tasks to finish this channel.
step4.readOnly: RFQ channel actions are available to the assigned marketing specialist.

request.addCommentPlaceholder: Add a comment for this step…
request.completeMarketingHint: Mark marketing and tender review as finished before forwarding to Contracts.
request.marketingReadOnly: Marketing workflow is in progress. Only HO Marketing staff can perform actions.
request.marketingWorkflowHint: After MR/SR approval the request follows the HO Marketing procedure through RFQ, evaluation, inline procurement plan approval and registration.
request.contractsWorkflowHint: After marketing is completed the request goes to the HO-CPROC department head, who routes it to a procurement section; the section head then assigns an engineer.
request.contractsDeptRouteHint: First select Local or International. The request is sent automatically to that section head, who then assigns an engineer.
request.contractsRouteAutoHint: After confirmation the request goes automatically to the section head: {section}

contractsTabs.routedToInternational: This request has already been routed to International procurement.
contractsTabs.routedToDomestic: This request has already been routed to Domestic procurement.
contractsTabs.domesticWorkflowPending: Domestic procurement workflow steps will be added once approved.
contractsTabs.paymentHint: Contract payment steps will appear here after the procurement procedure is completed.

request.contractsRouteStepHint: The Contracts and Procurement department head directs the request to one of the procurement sections.
request.contractsRouteScopedHint: The HO-CPROC department head routes the request to this procurement section.
request.waitingDeptHeadRoute: Awaiting section selection by the HO-CPROC department head.
request.contractsAssignStepHint: The procurement section head selects an engineer from their department. The engineer must accept the request before work begins.
request.assignEngineerHint: Select an engineer from your procurement section.
request.acceptContractsHintEngineer: Confirm that you accept this request and are ready to start contract work.
request.waitingEngineerAccept: Waiting for the assigned engineer to accept the request.
request.intVariantSelectionHint: International section specialist selects one of three execution variants.
request.intVariantDirectForeignHint: Direct agreement with a foreign supplier
request.domVariantSelectionHint: Domestic section specialist selects the procurement execution method.
request.domVariantEshopHint: E-shop: strategy review, lot alignment, price request, contract, delivery and closure
request.domVariantSmallValueHint: Small value: contract, payment, delivery and closure
request.domStepContractsAdminWaiting: Waiting for Contracts Administration ({name}) to close this step
request.returnToMarketingHint: Use this when the strategy, technical assignment or commercial proposals need rework.
request.rollbackContractHint: The process will return to step {step} for repeated lot coordination.
request.intStepSecretariatWaiting: Waiting for Tender Secretariat ({name}) to close this step
request.paymentPhaseHint: Payment section head assigns the request to themselves or a specialist.
request.contractsWorkersError: Could not load engineers from your department.
request.noContractsWorkers: No engineers available in your department
request.branchActive: A deviation branch is active — resolve it before completing this step.

branchRecord.PortalExpedite: No portal approval in 2 days — notify management

request.categoryDeadlineHint: Deadline counts from request receipt or last TA amendment (working days, excl. Sat/Sun).
request.approversHierarchyHint: Sequential approvers in order — each decision is recorded with comments.
request.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this request is rejected…
request.approversTabHint: Open the Approvers tab to approve or reject with comments.

step8.submitHint: Select approvers in order. Local procurement: Deputy CEO + CEO. Other types: commission members + CEO (CEO must be last).
step8.hierarchyHint: Approvers act in the order listed below.

step9.registrationHint: Confirm registration of the completed marketing process. The request will then be forwarded automatically to Contracts & Procurement.
step9.confirmCommentRequired: Comment is required when confirming registration
step9.autoContractsHint: Marketing is registered. The request has been forwarded to Contracts.
step9.registrationDoneHint: Marketing process registered. Request forwarded to Contracts.
step9.registrationPendingHint: Registration will appear here after step 9 is confirmed in the marketing workflow.

monitoring.hint: Full journey of the request across departments — available from the start.

monitoring.pipelineHint: Sequential steps with comments and actions
